reviews.review_msg: Replys really fast outside of class, extremely considerate teacher, one of the best teachers I've had!

dr yin is a very caring professor, it's a light course work which ensures her students do well. she is always willing to help and is clearly passionate about her teaching! she is always willing yo lend out a helping hand and replies to emails quickly, do recommend her class!
Lectures are dense but interesting. Grading was easy.
Great prof with interesting research interest on migration and media. enjoyed and recommend for those who enjoy theory
Easy class, and she is very nice, but lectures are mind numbing.  Endless talking with no interaction.  Talks for the whole 2 hours.
Her lectures are very dry and hard to catch up even though the concepts are not that hard to manage, even though she is a passionate lecturer.

Dr. Yin is fantastic as a lecturer. She does not put any unnecessary burden on students. Furthermore, her lectures are elementary to understand. She makes the concepts clear. She also records her lectures. The course materials are exciting. She is also really caring. Highly recommend her class. She has peer-reviewed journal articles.

Dr. Yin is a fantastic professor. She does not put unnecessary course load. The topics are fascinating, and she makes the lectures easy to understand alongside the slides. Dr. Yin also records the lectures. She makes excellent points to discuss, and her exams are lenient because she does not ask anything outside the lectures. Highly recommend.
She is chill and very nice. She is passionate about her course. Would recommend!
Took this in Spring 2020. Super chill class. I enjoyed her teaching style (very straightforward) and she's really nice.
